title: Medieval Buildings [End Edition]
description: New incredible medieval-style structures for the End!
body:
![Banner](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_End_Edition/BH_MBE_Header.webp) The Medieval Buildings universe expands with this new version for the End. Discover five impressive new medieval-style structures that may appear on the fantastic islands of the end. If you like adventure, this option is ideal for you, since all the structures are full of treasures, and of course, traps and enemies. You will surely love the experience in the dimension! **Don't forget to download the main version of Medieval Buildings! [Click here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/medieval-buildings)** **Medieval Buildings [Nether Edition] - NOW AVAILABLE! -> [Click Here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/medieval-buildings-nether-edition)** ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_End_Edition/BH_MBE_Summary.webp) In short, this modpack is ideal for any adventure and construction lover. But it will fit even better in a medieval world, with mods and add-ons from the past, and thus live an unforgettable gaming experience. The buildings are full of enemies, but also traps or valuable treasures, so visiting them can be of great help at some points in the game, although in others it can mean death... ![FAQ](https://bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_End_Edition/BH_MBE_Faq.webp) ### Is it compatible with other mods that add structures? ### Without a doubt, it is perfectly compatible with any other mod, both structures and biomes. Although in the latter, they will only appear in biomes with characteristics similar to those initially established. ### Where can the new structures be found? ### Only in the End dimension, on the islands you can access after defeating the dragon. They will be generated randomly and following certain parameters so that they are not too frequent. ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Medieval_Buildings_End_Edition/BH_MBE_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bq6nqeOx/images/d725b3abc1b99c694c0cd217afc5556d42bd7862.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bq6nqeOx/images/f42b7d0ca65d5aaa440e3c8a17240d0fbb1d1227.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bq6nqeOx/images/1ce69322eba5c763080aee7f185c70ddb1555bcd.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
